v.CNV: 最后，弟兄们，请为我们祷告，好叫主的道也像在你们那里一样快快传开，得着荣耀，
v.ESV: Finally, brothers, pray for us, that the word of the Lord may speed ahead and be honored, as happened among you,
v.GAE: 끝으로 형제들아 너희는 우리를 위하여 기도하기를 주의 말씀이 너희 가운데서와 같이 퍼져 나가 영광스럽게 되고
v.KJV: Finally, brethren, pray for us, that the word of the Lord may have free course, and be glorified, even as it is with you:
v.NASB: Finally, brethren, pray for us that the word of the Lord will spread rapidly and be glorified, just as it did also with you;
v.NIV: As for other matters, brothers and sisters, pray for us that the message of the Lord may spread rapidly and be honored, just as it was with you.
v.NRSV: Finally, brothers and sisters, pray for us, so that the word of the Lord may spread rapidly and be glorified everywhere, just as it is among you,
v.SAENEW: 마지막으로 형제자매 여러분, 주님의 말씀이 여러분에게 퍼진 것과 같이, 각처에 속히 퍼져서, 영광스럽게 되도록, 우리를 위해서 기도해 주십시오.
v.WLB: 마지막으로 형제들이여, 주의 말씀이 여러분에게서와 같이 속히 전파돼 영광스럽게 되고

v.CNV: 也使我们能够脱离那些不讲理的恶人，因为不是人人都有信心。
v.ESV: and that we may be delivered from wicked and evil men. For not all have faith.
v.GAE: 또한 우리를 부당하고 악한 사람들에게서 건지시옵소서 하라 믿음은 모든 사람의 것이 아니니라
v.KJV: And that we may be delivered from unreasonable and wicked men: for all men have not faith.
v.NASB: and that we will be rescued from perverse and evil men; for not all have faith.
v.NIV: And pray that we may be delivered from wicked and evil people, for not everyone has faith.
v.NRSV: and that we may be rescued from wicked and evil people; for not all have faith.
v.SAENEW: 또 우리가 심술궂고 악한 사람에게서 벗어나도록 기도해 주십시오. 사람마다 믿음을 가지고 있는 것이 아닙니다.
v.WLB: 또한 우리를 불의하고 사악한 사람들로부터 구원해 주시도록 우리를 위해 기도해 주십시오. 이는 믿음은 모든 사람들의 것이 아니기 때문입니다.

v.CNV: 主是信实的，他必坚定你们，保护你们脱离那恶者。
v.ESV: But the Lord is faithful. He will establish you and guard you against the evil one.
v.GAE: 주는 미쁘사 너희를 굳건하게 하시고 악한 자에게서 지키시리라
v.KJV: But the Lord is faithful, who shall stablish you, and keep you from evil.
v.NASB: But the Lord is faithful, and He will strengthen and protect you from the evil one.
v.NIV: But the Lord is faithful, and he will strengthen you and protect you from the evil one.
v.NRSV: But the Lord is faithful; he will strengthen you and guard you from the evil one.
v.SAENEW: 그러나 주님께서는 신실하신 분이시므로, 여러분을 굳세게 하시고, 악한 자에게서 지켜 주십니다.
v.WLB: 주께서는 신실하시니 여러분을 강하게 하시고 악한 자로부터 보호해 주실 것입니다.

v.CNV: 我们靠着主深深相信，你们现在以及将来都会遵行我们所吩咐的，
v.ESV: And we have confidence in the Lord about you, that you are doing and will do the things that we command.
v.GAE: 너희에 대하여는 우리가 명한 것을 너희가 행하고 또 행할 줄을 우리가 주 안에서 확신하노니
v.KJV: And we have confidence in the Lord touching you, that ye both do and will do the things which we command you.
v.NASB: We have confidence in the Lord concerning you, that you are doing and will continue to do what we command.
v.NIV: We have confidence in the Lord that you are doing and will continue to do the things we command.
v.NRSV: And we have confidence in the Lord concerning you, that you are doing and will go on doing the things that we command.
v.SAENEW: 우리가 명령한 것을 여러분이 지금도 실행하고 있고, 또 앞으로도 실행하리라는 것을, 우리는 주님 안에서 확신하고 있습니다.
v.WLB: 여러분에 관해서는 우리가 명령한 것들을 여러분이 행하고 있고 또 계속 행할 것을 주 안에서 확신합니다.

v.CNV: 愿主引导你们的心，使你们有　神的爱和基督的坚忍。
v.ESV: May the Lord direct your hearts to the love of God and to the steadfastness of Christ.
v.GAE: 주께서 너희 마음을 인도하여 하나님의 사랑과 그리스도의 인내에 들어가게 하시기를 원하노라
v.KJV: And the Lord direct your hearts into the love of God, and into the patient waiting for Christ.
v.NASB: May the Lord direct your hearts into the love of God and into the steadfastness of Christ.
v.NIV: May the Lord direct your hearts into God’s love and Christ’s perseverance.
v.NRSV: May the Lord direct your hearts to the love of God and to the steadfastness of Christ.
v.SAENEW: 주님께서 여러분의 마음을 인도하셔서, 여러분이, 하나님께서 사랑하시는 것과 같이 사랑하고, 그리스도께서 인내하시는 것과 같이 인내하기를 바랍니다.
v.WLB: 주께서 여러분의 마음을 인도하셔서 하나님의 사랑과 그리스도의 인내에 이르게 하시기를 빕니다.

v.CNV: 弟兄们，我们奉主耶稣基督的名吩咐你们，凡是游手好闲的弟兄，不按着你们从我们所领受的教训去行，就应当远离他。
v.ESV: Now we command you, brothers, in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, that you keep away from any brother who is walking in idleness and not in accord with the tradition that you received from us.
v.GAE: 형제들아 우리 주 예수 그리스도의 이름으로 너희를 명하노니 게으르게 행하고 우리에게서 받은 전통대로 행하지 아니하는 모든 형제에게서 떠나라
v.KJV: Now we command you, brethren, in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, that ye withdraw yourselves from every brother that walketh disorderly, and not after the tradition which he received of us.
v.NASB: Now we command you, brethren, in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, that you keep away from every brother who leads an unruly life and not according to the tradition which you received from us.
v.NIV: In the name of the Lord Jesus Christ, we command you, brothers and sisters, to keep away from every believer who is idle and disruptive and does not live according to the teaching you received from us.
v.NRSV: Now we command you, beloved, in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, to keep away from believers who are living in idleness and not according to the tradition that they received from us.
v.SAENEW: 형제자매 여러분, 우리는 [우리] 주 예수 그리스도의 이름으로 여러분에게 명령합니다. 무절제하게 살고 우리에게서 받은 전통을 따르지 않는 모든 신도를 멀리하십시오.
v.WLB: 형제들이여, 우리가 우리 주 예수 그리스도의 이름으로 여러분에게 명령합니다. 여러분은 게을리 행하고 우리에게서 받은 전통을 따라 살지 않는 모든 형제를 멀리하십시오.

v.CNV: 你们自己本来就知道应当怎样效法我们，因为我们在你们中间并没有游手好闲，
v.ESV: For you yourselves know how you ought to imitate us, because we were not idle when we were with you,
v.GAE: 어떻게 우리를 본받아야 할지를 너희가 스스로 아나니 우리가 너희 가운데서 무질서하게 행하지 아니하며
v.KJV: For yourselves know how ye ought to follow us: for we behaved not ourselves disorderly among you;
v.NASB: For you yourselves know how you ought to follow our example, because we did not act in an undisciplined manner among you,
v.NIV: For you yourselves know how you ought to follow our example. We were not idle when we were with you,
v.NRSV: For you yourselves know how you ought to imitate us; we were not idle when we were with you,
v.SAENEW: 우리를 어떻게 본받아야 하는지는 여러분이 잘 알고 있습니다. 우리는 여러분 가운데서 무절제한 생활을 한 일이 없습니다.
v.WLB: 여러분은 우리를 어떻게 본받아야 할 것인지 스스로 알고 있습니다. 우리는 여러분과 함께 있을 때 게을리 행하지 않았고

v.CNV: 也没有白吃过谁的饭，反而辛苦劳碌，昼夜作工，免得加重你们任何一人的负担。
v.ESV: nor did we eat anyone's bread without paying for it, but with toil and labor we worked night and day, that we might not be a burden to any of you.
v.GAE: 누구에게서든지 음식을 값없이 먹지 않고 오직 수고하고 애써 주야로 일함은 너희 아무에게도 폐를 끼치지 아니하려 함이니
v.KJV: Neither did we eat any man’s bread for nought; but wrought with labour and travail night and day, that we might not be chargeable to any of you:
v.NASB: nor did we eat anyone's bread without paying for it, but with labor and hardship we kept working night and day so that we would not be a burden to any of you;
v.NIV: nor did we eat anyone’s food without paying for it. On the contrary, we worked night and day, laboring and toiling so that we would not be a burden to any of you.
v.NRSV: and we did not eat anyone’s bread without paying for it; but with toil and labor we worked night and day, so that we might not burden any of you.
v.SAENEW: 우리는 아무에게서도 양식을 거저 얻어먹은 일이 없고, 도리어 여러분 가운데서 어느 누구에게도 짐이 되지 않으려고, 수고하고 고생하면서 밤낮으로 일하였습니다.
v.WLB: 아무에게서도 음식을 값없이 먹지 않았고 도리어 여러분 가운데 어느 누구에게도 짐이 되지 않으려고 수고하고 고생하며 밤낮으로 일했습니다.

v.CNV: 这不是因为我们没有权利，而是要给你们作榜样，好让你们效法我们。
v.ESV: It was not because we do not have that right, but to give you in ourselves an example to imitate.
v.GAE: 우리에게 권리가 없는 것이 아니요 오직 스스로 너희에게 본을 보여 우리를 본받게 하려 함이니라
v.KJV: Not because we have not power, but to make ourselves an ensample unto you to follow us.
v.NASB: not because we do not have the right to this, but in order to offer ourselves as a model for you, so that you would follow our example.
v.NIV: We did this, not because we do not have the right to such help, but in order to offer ourselves as a model for you to imitate.
v.NRSV: This was not because we do not have that right, but in order to give you an example to imitate.
v.SAENEW: 그것은, 우리에게 권리가 없어서가 아니라, 우리가 여러분에게 본을 보여서, 여러분으로 하여금 우리를 본받게 하려는 것입니다.
v.WLB: 이는 우리가 권한이 없어서가 아니라 우리 스스로 여러분에게 본을 보여 우리로 본을 삼게 하기 위한 것입니다.

v.CNV: 我们在你们那里的时候，曾经吩咐过你们，如果有人不肯作工，就不可吃饭。
v.ESV: For even when we were with you, we would give you this command: If anyone is not willing to work, let him not eat.
v.GAE: 우리가 너희와 함께 있을 때에도 너희에게 명하기를 누구든지 일하기 싫어하거든 먹지도 말게 하라 하였더니
v.KJV: For even when we were with you, this we commanded you, that if any would not work, neither should he eat.
v.NASB: For even when we were with you, we used to give you this order: if anyone is not willing to work, then he is not to eat, either.
v.NIV: For even when we were with you, we gave you this rule: “The one who is unwilling to work shall not eat.”
v.NRSV: For even when we were with you, we gave you this command: Anyone unwilling to work should not eat.
v.SAENEW: 우리가 여러분과 함께 있을 때에 "일하기를 싫어하는 사람은 먹지도 말라" 하고 거듭 명하였습니다.
v.WLB: 우리가 여러분과 함께 있을 때도 여러분에게 명령하기를 “누구든지 일하기 싫으면 먹지도 말라”고 했습니다.

v.CNV: 因为我们听说，你们中间有人游手好闲，什么工也不作，反倒专管闲事。
v.ESV: For we hear that some among you walk in idleness, not busy at work, but busybodies.
v.GAE: 우리가 들은즉 너희 가운데 게으르게 행하여 도무지 일하지 아니하고 일을 만들기만 하는 자들이 있다 하니
v.KJV: For we hear that there are some which walk among you disorderly, working not at all, but are busybodies.
v.NASB: For we hear that some among you are leading an undisciplined life, doing no work at all, but acting like busybodies.
v.NIV: We hear that some among you are idle and disruptive. They are not busy; they are busybodies.
v.NRSV: For we hear that some of you are living in idleness, mere busybodies, not doing any work.
v.SAENEW: 그런데 우리가 들으니, 여러분 가운데는 무절제하게 살면서, 일은 하지 않고, 일을 만들기만 하는 사람이 더러 있다고 합니다.
v.WLB: 내가 들으니 여러분 가운데 몇몇 사람들이 게을리 행하고 아무 일도 하지 않고 참견이나 한다고 합니다.

v.CNV: 我们靠着主耶稣基督，吩咐劝戒这样的人，要安静作工，自食其力。
v.ESV: Now such persons we command and encourage in the Lord Jesus Christ to do their work quietly and to earn their own living.
v.GAE: 이런 자들에게 우리가 명하고 주 예수 그리스도 안에서 권하기를 조용히 일하여 자기 양식을 먹으라 하노라
v.KJV: Now them that are such we command and exhort by our Lord Jesus Christ, that with quietness they work, and eat their own bread.
v.NASB: Now such persons we command and exhort in the Lord Jesus Christ to work in quiet fashion and eat their own bread.
v.NIV: Such people we command and urge in the Lord Jesus Christ to settle down and earn the food they eat.
v.NRSV: Now such persons we command and exhort in the Lord Jesus Christ to do their work quietly and to earn their own living.
v.SAENEW: 이런 사람들에게, 우리는 주 예수 그리스도 안에서 명하며, 또 권면합니다. 조용히 일해서, 자기가 먹을 것을 자기가 벌어서 먹으십시오.
v.WLB: 그런 사람들에게 우리는 주 예수 그리스도 안에서 명령하고 또 권면합니다. 조용히 일해 자신의 양식을 먹도록 하십시오.

v.CNV: 弟兄们，你们行善不可灰心。
v.ESV: As for you, brothers, do not grow weary in doing good.
v.GAE: 형제들아 너희는 선을 행하다가 낙심하지 말라
v.KJV: But ye, brethren, be not weary in well doing.
v.NASB: But as for you, brethren, do not grow weary of doing good.
v.NIV: And as for you, brothers and sisters, never tire of doing what is good.
v.NRSV: Brothers and sisters, do not be weary in doing what is right.
v.SAENEW: 형제자매 여러분, 선한 일을 하다가 낙심하지 마십시오.
v.WLB: 그러나 형제들이여, 선을 행하다가 낙심하지 마십시오.

v.CNV: 如果有人不听从我们这封信上的训勉，要把这个人记下来，不可和他来往，好叫他自己觉得惭愧。
v.ESV: If anyone does not obey what we say in this letter, take note of that person, and have nothing to do with him, that he may be ashamed.
v.GAE: 누가 이 편지에 한 우리 말을 순종하지 아니하거든 그 사람을 지목하여 사귀지 말고 그로 하여금 부끄럽게 하라
v.KJV: And if any man obey not our word by this epistle, note that man, and have no company with him, that he may be ashamed.
v.NASB: If anyone does not obey our instruction in this letter, take special note of that person and do not associate with him, so that he will be put to shame.
v.NIV: Take special note of anyone who does not obey our instruction in this letter. Do not associate with them, in order that they may feel ashamed.
v.NRSV: Take note of those who do not obey what we say in this letter; have nothing to do with them, so that they may be ashamed.
v.SAENEW: 누가 이 편지에 담긴 우리의 말에 복종하지 아니하거든, 그 사람을 특별히 조심하여, 그와 사귀지 마십시오. 그리하여 그로 하여금 부끄러움을 느끼게 하십시오.
v.WLB: 누구든지 이 편지에서 한 우리의 말을 순종치 않거든 그를 지목해 그와 어울리지 마십시오. 그리하여 그로 부끄러움을 느끼게 하십시오.

v.CNV: 但不要把他看作仇敌，却要劝他好像劝弟兄一样。
v.ESV: Do not regard him as an enemy, but warn him as a brother.
v.GAE: 그러나 원수와 같이 생각하지 말고 형제 같이 권면하라
v.KJV: Yet count him not as an enemy, but admonish him as a brother.
v.NASB: Yet do not regard him as an enemy, but admonish him as a brother.
v.NIV: Yet do not regard them as an enemy, but warn them as you would a fellow believer.
v.NRSV: Do not regard them as enemies, but warn them as believers.
v.SAENEW: 그러나 그를 원수처럼 여기지 말고, 형제자매에게 하듯이 타이르십시오.
v.WLB: 그러나 그를 원수처럼 여기지 말고 형제같이 권고하십시오.

v.CNV: 愿赐平安的主亲自随时随地赐平安给你们。愿主与你们众人同在。
v.ESV: Now may the Lord of peace himself give you peace at all times in every way. The Lord be with you all.
v.GAE: 평강의 주께서 친히 때마다 일마다 너희에게 평강을 주시고 주께서 너희 모든 사람과 함께 하시기를 원하노라
v.KJV: Now the Lord of peace himself give you peace always by all means. The Lord be with you all.
v.NASB: Now may the Lord of peace Himself continually grant you peace in every circumstance. The Lord be with you all!
v.NIV: Now may the Lord of peace himself give you peace at all times and in every way. The Lord be with all of you.
v.NRSV: Now may the Lord of peace himself give you peace at all times in all ways. The Lord be with all of you.
v.SAENEW: 평화의 주님께서 친히 언제나 어느 방식으로든지, 여러분에게 평화를 주시기를 빕니다. 주님께서 여러분 모두와 함께 하시기를 빕니다.
v.WLB: 평강의 주께서 친히 여러분에게 온갖 방식으로 항상 평강 주시기를 빕니다. 주께서 여러분 모두와 함께하시기를 원합니다.

v.CNV: 我保罗亲笔问候你们。这是我每一封信的记号；我的笔迹就是这样。
v.ESV: I, Paul, write this greeting with my own hand. This is the sign of genuineness in every letter of mine; it is the way I write.
v.GAE: 나 바울은 친필로 문안하노니 이는 편지마다 표시로서 이렇게 쓰노라
v.KJV: The salutation of Paul with mine own hand, which is the token in every epistle: so I write.
v.NASB: I, Paul, write this greeting with my own hand, and this is a distinguishing mark in every letter; this is the way I write.
v.NIV: I, Paul, write this greeting in my own hand, which is the distinguishing mark in all my letters. This is how I write.
v.NRSV: I, Paul, write this greeting with my own hand. This is the mark in every letter of mine; it is the way I write.
v.SAENEW: 나 바울이 친필로 문안합니다. 이것이 모든 편지에 서명하는 표요, 내가 편지를 쓰는 방식입니다.
v.WLB: 나 바울은 친필로 문안합니다. 이것이 모든 편지의 표식이 되므로 내가 이렇게 씁니다.

v.CNV: 愿我们主耶稣基督的恩惠与你们众人同在。
v.ESV: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all.
v.GAE: 우리 주 예수 그리스도의 은혜가 너희 무리에게 있을지어다
v.KJV: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all. Amen.
v.NASB: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all.
v.NIV: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all.
v.NRSV: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with all of you.
v.SAENEW: 우리 주 예수 그리스도의 은혜가 여러분 모두에게 있기를 빕니다.
v.WLB: 우리 주 예수 그리스도의 은혜가 여러분 모두와 함께하시기를 빕니다.
